posts.author: Raj10
posts.text: Introducing Alert-Triggered Orders (ATO) feature on Kite — Is the development in progress or this is in backlog. What could be the expected release date for this? Thankyou

posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Introducing Alert-Triggered Orders (ATO) feature on Kite — Already on our list, we’ll pick it up soon.

posts.author: nx.vijay
posts.text: Introducing Alert-Triggered Orders (ATO) feature on Kite — I agree, this is the problem… There should be option for Trigger and Sell price so in volatile market we can cover the risk.

posts.author: Raj10
posts.text: Introducing Alert-Triggered Orders (ATO) feature on Kite — @Arockiya_Raja @siva ATO experience has been smooth, previous raised issues have not occured agin till date. Thankyou I just have a suggestion/request. → I use ATO to buy stock as a limit order and place a GTT sl order % simultaneously. The problem with GTT sell order is the trigger price and Price is identical. My sl are tight, as there is no buffer my sell order can be missed. Current solution is I manually modify gtt sell order price with 3% buffer as SL is hit user wants to get out basically at MP i.e 3% buffer. Could you please ad…
